summary.archival_abstract: This original reporting published by The Hologram on 2023-07-26 documents “Star Atlas Makes Major Lay Off and Runway Announcement.” Its surviving text addresses governance, economy, game development, community, lore. The record is preserved as contemporary evidence of how HNN presented the subject at publication time; factual and forward-looking claims remain attributed to the publication and require reconciliation with primary or later sources.

article_text:
Star AtlasCrypto
Star Atlas Makes Major Lay Off and Runway Announcement
Krigs2 min read·Jul 26, 2023
--
Listen
Share
July 25th —Citing a lack of external funding, Star Atlas has reduced its workforce by 73%
Key Takeaways from the Announcement
· Approximately 122 people were let go, or roughly 73% of the remaining workforce after FTX. This includes external Spearsoft developers that were working on UE5. 45 people now remain working for ATMTA
· UE5 development is now on an extended timeline. Marketplace, DAO, and Faction Fleet and Faction claims will be maintained at a lower priority. SAGE and Mobile app that was announced at Play GG are the top priority
· Each of the Founders, including Wagner, have taken a pay cut. Potential as low as $36,000 dollars a year per Florida state laws.
· Runway extended up to a year and beyond as a direct result of workforce reduction.
Press enter or click to view image in full size
Wagner Addresses Workforce and Community
Press enter or click to view image in full size
The full announcement can be found in the Star Atlas discord.
Michael Wagner will address the community during a special AMA on Wednesday, July 26th at 1 PM EST in the Star Atlas Discord.
About the Author
Krigs is a pioneer in the world of Star Atlas, having founded The Hologram News Network — an independent meta-news organization that keeps players up to date on all developments regarding Star Atlas. An ardent supporter of emerging technologies, Krigs has been covering this game for over a year and believes passionately in their power to revolutionize our collective gaming experience.

Podcast | YouTube | Twitter | Instagram | Web
About The Hologram
The Hologram is Star Atlas’ first and only independent news network. Our vision is to become the most trusted source of information about Star Atlas and a voice for the whole community. Readers can expect a high standard from our reporting and staff. Our promise to you: we will not publish anything that hasn’t been thoroughly researched and based on the best facts available.
Any information published by The Hologram or its writers should be considered as informational in nature and does not constitute any financial advice.
